---
title: "Services"
subtitle: "How we work with you."
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
---

We engage with clients in whatever way fits the project — from one-off analyses to ongoing reporting partnerships.

::: {.services-list}

::: {.service-section}
[]{.fa-solid .fa-database .service-section-icon}

### Data infrastructure

**Data collection design.** We build spreadsheets, templates, and intake forms that capture clean data the first time, so you spend less time fixing it later.

**SQL development.** Custom queries, stored procedures, and views to get the right data out of your databases — whether that's SQL Server, Oracle, PostgreSQL, or something else.
:::

::: {.service-section}
[]{.fa-solid .fa-magnifying-glass-chart .service-section-icon}

### Analysis & insight

**Trending and statistical analysis.** Identifying what's actually changing in your data versus normal variation, with clear explanations of what we found and why it matters.

**Exploratory analysis.** When you have data but aren't sure what it's telling you, we dig in and surface the patterns worth paying attention to.

**Predictive modeling.** Forecasting and risk assessment for operational data — like the 6-month impurity forecasts in our pharmaceutical dashboard.
:::

::: {.service-section}
[]{.fa-solid .fa-chart-line .service-section-icon}

### Visualization & dashboards

**Interactive Shiny applications.** Custom web-based dashboards built in R/Shiny — your team explores the data themselves, with guardrails and context built in.

**Excel dashboards.** When the right tool for the job is Excel, we build interactive workbooks with charts, slicers, and pivot tables.

**Tableau and Power BI.** When you're already in those ecosystems, we build dashboards that fit your existing toolchain.
:::

::: {.service-section}
[]{.fa-solid .fa-file-export .service-section-icon}

### Automated reporting

**Scheduled report pipelines.** R Markdown, Quarto, and Crystal Reports configurations that generate and distribute reports automatically — no manual effort, no missed deliveries.

**Custom report templates.** Branded, parameterized templates that produce consistent output across departments or product lines.
:::

:::

---

## How engagements work

::: {.process-grid}

::: {.process-step}
**1. Conversation**
A 30-minute call to understand what you're working with and what you need. No charge, no commitment.
:::

::: {.process-step}
**2. Scoped pilot**
We propose a small, well-defined first deliverable so you can see how we work before committing to anything bigger.
:::

::: {.process-step}
**3. Build**
We deliver iteratively — early prototypes you can react to, with refinements based on your feedback.
:::

::: {.process-step}
**4. Handoff or partnership**
Either we hand off the finished product with documentation, or we stay engaged for ongoing support and enhancements. Your call.
:::

:::

---

::: {.cta-section}

## Have a project in mind?

[Get in touch](contact.qmd){.btn .btn-light .btn-lg}

:::
